description: Review open pull requests for a repository, summarize risk areas, and draft a reviewer checklist for each PR.
author: codex
mermaid_fsm:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> NavigatePullRequests
  NavigatePullRequests --> ExtractPullRequestList: prs_loaded
  ExtractPullRequestList --> ExtractPullRequestDetails: list_ready
  ExtractPullRequestDetails --> SummarizeReviewRisk: details_ready
  SummarizeReviewRisk --> SaveReviewPacket: packet_ready
  SaveReviewPacket --> CaptureEvidence: saved
  CaptureEvidence --> [*]

steps.description: Open the repository pull requests tab and wait for the pull request rows to render.
Extract open pull requests including title, author, labels, review status, and updated timestamp.
Read the PR description, changed files summary, and recent review comments for each candidate PR.
Produce a concise review brief with risk areas, missing tests, and recommended reviewer focus points.
Write the review packet to the local outbox as markdown.
Capture the PR queue used to assemble the review packet.
